examples: Her virtuousness would be reflected by her support to me.
To construct Qinghai , it requires that the leaders at all levels in Qinghai must stress on moral culture and make efforts to cultivate virtuousness ;
They intend to publicize the human virtuousness, social beauty and self renewal by means of negating the human's evils, social defects and self sufferings.
Abstainers were told that their virtuousness was hurting commerce and depriving the country of revenue.
Bergman treats their impossible virtuousness as a species of screwball-comedy idiosyncrasy, and makes us believe in them.
